author: Five
name: FluxMobile
description: Automatically monitors the Fluxer Mobile GitHub repository and announces new Android APK releases to a configured channel. Includes duplicate protection, verbose logging, diagnostics and manual checking.
install_msg: Thank you for installing FluxMobile! Configure it with `[p]flux channel`, `[p]flux logs`, then `[p]flux enable`.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores guild configuration including channel IDs, logging preferences and the ID of the last announced release. No personal data is collected.
